meta.title: Travellium — flights, trains, buses & hotels
meta.description: Compare and book flights, trains, buses, and hotels in one place. Simple, fast, reliable.

hero.title: One search — every way to get there
hero.subtitle: Flights, trains, buses, and hotels. Compare prices and book in minutes.

hints.flights: Compare airlines and find the best fares worldwide
hints.trains: Train tickets across Russia & CIS — e-ticket ready
hints.buses: Intercity coaches — direct routes and connections
hints.hotels: Hotels and apartments — from hostels to luxury

mosaic.caption: Flights · Trains · Buses · Hotels — one journey

destinations.title: Trending destinations
destinations.subtitle: Best fares on the most searched routes

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps from search to booking

search.title: Pick your route
search.description: Enter city, dates, and trip type — flight, train, bus, or hotel.

compare.title: Compare options
compare.description: See the best offers from trusted partners in one clear list.

book.title: Book online
book.description: Pay securely and get your confirmation by email in seconds.

features.title: Travellium — your reliable travel companion
features.subtitle: We bring together top carriers and hotels so you spend less time searching.

unified.title: Everything in one place
unified.description: Stop jumping between sites — search tickets and hotels on one platform.

secure.title: Secure payments
secure.description: Protected transactions and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Our team is here before, during, and after your trip.

referral.title: Referral program
referral.description: Invite friends and earn rewards — launching soon on the platform.

cta.title: Ready for your next trip?
cta.subtitle: Start searching now — no sign-up required.

anna.name: Anna K.
anna.text: Found a cheaper fare than on the airline site. Clean interface, no extra steps.

dmitry.name: Dmitry V.
dmitry.text: Great to compare trains and flights in one place. Waiting for full booking.

elena.name: Elena M.
elena.text: Fast hotel search with sensible filters. Support replied the same day.

searchResults.widgetNotice: These are demo results. The full booking widget will be connected later.

auth.loginSubtitle: Save searches and get price-drop alerts.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up in under a minute.
auth.successText: Auth is in demo mode for now. Full account features are coming soon.

about.title: Travellium — travel made simple
about.p1: We are building one platform to search flights, trains, buses, and hotels — less tab-switching, clearer pricing.
about.p2: The site currently runs in search and demo mode. Partner widgets and payments are in development.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: Travellium processes personal data only to operate the service: search, registration, and support.
privacy.p2: We do not share data with third parties without consent, except where required by law.
privacy.p3: The full policy will be published before payment features launch.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.p1: By using Travellium you agree to these terms and demo-mode limitations.
terms.p2: Prices and availability on demo pages are illustrative and not an offer.
terms.p3: Booking terms will be published when partner APIs are connected.

booking.q: Can I book a ticket yet?
booking.a: Search and demo results are available now. Full booking will launch after partner integration.

payment.q: Which payment methods will you support?
payment.a: We plan cards and popular payment providers. The final list will be announced at launch.

refund.a: Refund rules depend on the carrier or hotel fare. Details will be shown at checkout.

support.a: Email support@travellium.com — we reply during business hours; 24/7 support is planned.

referral.q: When does the referral program launch?
referral.a: It is in development. Sign up early and we will notify you at launch.

referral.title: Referral program
referral.subtitle: Invite friends and earn travel rewards
referral.comingSoon: The program is in development. Register now and we will notify you at launch.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.text: Cookies help us improve the service and remember your preferences. By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The link may be outdated or the page may have moved.
